trajectory.description: Observation: SAKT overfit heavily (train loss 0.40, val AUC 0.709), while DKT achieved 0.7588 AUC but also showed signs of overfitting. Analysis: Transformers often overfit on smaller datasets like ASSISTments 2009. RNNs have a better inductive bias here. To improve DKT, I will implement DKT_SkillEmb (which concatenates the target skill embedding with the LSTM hidden state before prediction) and add stronger regularization (dropout=0.4, weight_decay=1e-5, smaller hidden_dim=128). Decision: Write the updated models and train DKT_SkillEmb for 20 epochs.

trajectory.description: Observation: DKT_SkillEmb with strong regularization underperformed the baseline DKT. Analysis: The baseline DKT with LSTM worked well. GRU is often comparable or better than LSTM on sequence tasks and trains faster. I will implement DKT_GRU and DKT_Concat (separate embeddings for skill and correctness) to explore architectural variations. Decision: Train DKT_GRU for 20 epochs with the same hyperparameters as the best DKT model (embed_dim=256, hidden_dim=256, dropout=0.2) and evaluate.

trajectory.description: Observation: DKT_GRU achieved a new best AUC of 0.7625, outperforming the LSTM-based DKT. The validation AUC peaked at epoch 9 (0.7645) and then slightly declined, indicating some overfitting. Analysis: GRU is faster and seems to perform slightly better than LSTM here. To further improve, I will test DKT_Concat_GRU, which uses separate embeddings for the skill and the correctness (concatenated) instead of a single interaction embedding. I will also increase dropout to 0.3 to mitigate overfitting. Decision: Implement DKT_Concat_GRU, update train.py and predict.py, and train for 20 epochs.

trajectory.description: Observation: DKT_Concat_GRU achieved a new best AUC of 0.7639. The validation AUC peaked at epoch 12 (0.7680) and then slightly declined, indicating some overfitting. Analysis: The model uses 2 GRU layers. Reducing the number of layers to 1 and increasing dropout to 0.4 might help regularize the model and prevent overfitting, potentially leading to better generalization. Decision: Update model.py, train.py, and predict.py to support configurable num_layers, and train DKT_Concat_GRU with num_layers=1 and dropout=0.4 for 20 epochs.

trajectory.description: Observation: DKT_Concat_GRU with num_layers=1 and dropout=0.4 achieved a new best AUC of 0.7650. The validation AUC is very stable around 0.768-0.769 in the later epochs. Analysis: The model is performing well but might benefit from better training stability and regularization. Adding Layer Normalization (LayerNorm) before and after the GRU can help stabilize the hidden states and potentially improve generalization. Decision: Implement DKT_Concat_GRU_LN (with LayerNorm), update the scripts, and train it with the same hyperparameters (embed_dim=256, hidden_dim=256, num_layers=1, dropout=0.4) for 20 epochs.

trajectory.description: Observation: DKT_Concat_GRU_LN achieved 0.7648 AUC, slightly worse than DKT_Concat_GRU (0.7650). Analysis: LayerNorm didn't help much. I will now implement DKT_TargetEmb, which concatenates the target skill embedding with the GRU hidden state before passing it through an MLP to predict the correctness. This allows the model to condition its prediction more explicitly on the target skill, similar to SAKT but using a recurrent backbone. Decision: Implement DKT_TargetEmb, update train.py and predict.py, and train for 20 epochs.

trajectory.description: Observation: In iteration 9, the training of DKT_TargetEmb finished successfully and saved to checkpoints/best.pt, but the command failed because predict.py was incorrectly run on the hidden test data during the training phase. Analysis: I can evaluate the already trained DKT_TargetEmb model by submitting an eval request for it. To save time, I will copy the current best.pt to dkt_target_emb.pt and submit it for evaluation, while simultaneously training a new model (DKT_Concat_GRU_DeepOut) in the command. Decision: Rewrite model.py, train.py, and predict.py to include DKT_Concat_GRU_DeepOut. Run a command to copy the checkpoint and train the new model, and submit eval for dkt_target_emb.pt.

trajectory.description: Observation: In iteration 10, DKT_Concat_GRU_DeepOut trained successfully and achieved a new high Val AUC of 0.7686. The eval failed because it tried to evaluate the broken DKT_TargetEmb model from iteration 9. Analysis: I will submit an eval for the successful DKT_Concat_GRU_DeepOut model. Meanwhile, I will implement a new architecture, DKT_TargetAttention, which uses a GRU to process the sequence and then applies MultiheadAttention over the past GRU hidden states, queried by the target skill embedding. This combines the strengths of RNNs and Attention. Decision: Copy the best checkpoint to dkt_deepout.pt and submit it for eval. Write the new model and train DKT_TargetAttention for 20 epochs.

trajectory.description: Observation: DKT_Concat_GRU_DeepOut achieved a new best test AUC of 0.7650. The validation AUC was still slightly increasing or plateauing at epoch 20. Analysis: I will try adding LayerNorm to the DeepOut module to improve stability and generalization, and use a CosineAnnealingLR scheduler over 25 epochs to allow the model to converge more smoothly. I will also implement an LSTM version for future comparison. Decision: Update model.py, train.py, and predict.py to include DKT_Concat_GRU_DeepOut_LN and DKT_Concat_LSTM_DeepOut_LN. Train the GRU version for 25 epochs and submit for evaluation.

trajectory.description: Observation: DKT_Concat_GRU_DeepOut_LN achieved 0.7649 AUC, slightly worse than without LayerNorm. Analysis: To push the performance further, I will introduce explicit historical features: the number of past attempts and past correct attempts for each skill. I will implement DKT_Target_Features, which precomputes these counts and feeds them into the GRU and the output layer. This provides the model with explicit success rate information for the target skill. Decision: Implement DKT_Target_Features, update train.py to precompute features, update predict.py, and train for 25 epochs.

trajectory.description: Observation: DKT_Target_Features achieved a new best AUC of 0.7679. The explicit historical features (attempts, correct_attempts) helped significantly. Analysis: We can further enrich the feature set by adding 'recency' (time since last attempt on the same skill) and 'total_corrects' (overall student success rate). I will implement DKT_Target_Features_Ext which includes these new features, both as embeddings and as continuous normalized features projected through a linear layer. Decision: Implement DKT_Target_Features_Ext, update precompute_features to extract the new features, and train for 25 epochs.

trajectory.description: Observation: DKT_Target_Features_Ext achieved a new best AUC of 0.7694. The explicit historical features (attempts, correct_attempts, total_corrects, recency) are very effective. Analysis: We can further refine these features by explicitly computing continuous success rates (skill_success_rate, total_success_rate) and log-scaling the counts (log_recency, log_total_attempts). This provides the model with more direct signals about the student's proficiency. Decision: Implement DKT_Target_Features_Ext2 with these new continuous features, update the scripts, and train for 25 epochs with hidden_dim=256.

Decision: Implement DKT_Target_Features_Ext3 which combines both raw counts (normalized) and computed ratios, and adds an extra hidden layer to the output MLP to better combine these features with the GRU hidden state. Train for 25 epochs and submit for evaluation.

Decision: Fix the bug in train.py and predict.py, and re-run the training of DKT_Target_Features_Ext6 for 25 epochs.

trajectory.description: Observation: In iteration 20, training for 30 epochs yielded a slightly lower test AUC (0.7671) than iteration 14 (0.7694) which trained for 25 epochs. Analysis: The CosineAnnealingLR scheduler depends on the total number of epochs. Training for 25 epochs means the learning rate decays to 0 exactly at epoch 25, which likely resulted in the optimal convergence found in iteration 14. Decision: Retrain DKT_Target_Features_Ext for exactly 25 epochs to replicate the best result, and submit for evaluation.
